personality: Imperious, calculating, burdened by station. Speaks with measured authority and veiled impatience.

greetingPool.text: You stand in the presence of the lord of this domain. Speak your piece.
These lands are under my protection. I trust you bring no trouble.
A traveller on the King's Road. You may rest here, but mind our laws.

idlePool.text: The northern holdings owe three months of tithe. My patience with Lord Fenwick grows thin.
A lord must balance mercy and justice on a blade's edge. Today the edge is sharp.
